name: lars-cc-skills
description: Curated Claude Code skills, refined for knowledge workers.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Output token reduction via caveman-speak modes (lite/full/ultra).

plugins.name: repomix
plugins.description: Pack a folder as single AI-readable file for cross-project context.

plugins.name: security-auditor
plugins.description: Audit a skill or plugin folder for supply-chain risks (LICENSE, allowed-tools, bash calls).

plugins.name: mermaid-diagram-specialist
plugins.description: Generate Mermaid diagrams (flowchart, sequence, ERD, C4, state, Gantt) from text descriptions.

plugins.name: changelog-skill
plugins.description: Generate Keep-a-Changelog-conformant CHANGELOG.md from git log.

plugins.name: karpathy-skills
plugins.description: Coding principles (Think Before, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution). Karpathy-inspired, by forrestchang/multica-ai.

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Remove AI-writing patterns (em-dash overuse, leverage, inflated symbolism). English + German variants.

plugins.name: obsidian-markdown
plugins.description: Generate valid Obsidian-flavored markdown (wikilinks, callouts, properties, embeds). Activate PARA-style path conventions with `wikilink_style: lars-para` or `--wikilink-style lars-para`.

plugins.name: jq
plugins.description: Translate natural-language JSON questions into jq expressions.
